index.html:
CSS-Only Stacking Cards

Beautiful
Modern
CSS

  • 01

    Sticky Stacking

    Utilizes `position: sticky` to create a stacking context where elements layer on top of one another naturally within the flow.

  • 02

    Scroll Driven

    Animations are powered by `animation-timeline: view()`, allowing precise control based on the element's visibility in the viewport.

  • 03

    3D Depth

    Combines `perspective` with 3D transforms to create depth perception, tilting cards backward as they ascend the scroll port.

  • 04

    Performant

    Animations run on the compositor thread ensuring 60fps performance without main-thread blocking or layout thrashing.

The End.
